hero.title: Claw
hero.subtitle: AI Belongs to Everyone
hero.desc: From desktop powerhouse to pocket-sized AI. Powerful, private, and ready out of the box.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.desc: Most people can't deploy models, configure APIs, or manage infrastructure. The AI revolution is leaving everyday users behind.

items.title: Complex Deployment
items.desc: Setting up AI models requires technical expertise most people don't have.

items.title: Privacy Concerns
items.desc: Cloud AI means your data travels to someone else's servers.

items.title: Expensive APIs
items.desc: Monthly subscriptions and per-token pricing add up fast.

items.title: Fragmented Tools
items.desc: Switching between dozens of AI apps with no unified experience.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.desc: We believe everyone deserves access to AI — without needing a computer science degree. iClaw puts the power of a personal AI factory in your hands.

pillars.title: Accessible
pillars.desc: No coding, no configuration. Just plug in and start creating.

pillars.title: Private
pillars.desc: Your data stays on your device. Always under your control.

pillars.title: Powerful
pillars.desc: Run state-of-the-art AI models locally with desktop-grade performance.

product.label: Product Lineup
product.heading: Two forms, one mission.
product.desc: Whether you need powerful desktop AI or portable AI on the go, we've got you covered.

iclaw.name: iClaw
iclaw.desc: A plug-and-play personal AI computer with powerful performance, silent operation, built for your desk.

uclaw.name: uClaw
uclaw.desc: Plug into any computer for instant AI power. Your personal AI, portable and always ready.
uclaw.imageAlt: uClaw AI USB Drive - product view

items.title: Ready Out of the Box
items.desc: Power on and start using AI immediately. Zero configuration needed.

items.title: Local Data Security
items.desc: All data stays on your device. No uploads, no cloud storage, no tracking.

items.title: Continuous Companion
items.desc: Always-on AI that learns your preferences and grows with you over time.

items.title: Simple Interface
items.desc: An intuitive GUI designed for everyone — from students to professionals.

aiPower.label: AI Power
aiPower.heading: The future of productivity.
aiPower.desc: Run powerful AI agents, workflows, and automations — all locally on your iClaw.

capabilities.title: AI Writing
capabilities.desc: Generate articles, marketing copy, emails, and creative content with natural language.

capabilities.title: AI Coding
capabilities.desc: Write, debug, and refactor code across multiple programming languages.

capabilities.title: AI Automation
capabilities.desc: Build workflows and automate repetitive tasks with intelligent agents.

capabilities.title: AI Analytics
capabilities.desc: Analyze data, generate insights, and create visualizations from any dataset.

useCases.label: Use Cases
useCases.heading: Built for how you work.
useCases.desc: No matter your profession, iClaw adapts to your workflow and amplifies your output.

design.label: Design
design.heading: Crafted with precision.
design.desc: Two products, same philosophy — minimal, powerful, and built to last.

iclaw.name: iClaw
iclaw.imageAlt: iClaw industrial design - premium aluminum body

uclaw.name: uClaw
uclaw.imageAlt: uClaw USB AI drive - dual interface design

security.label: Security & Privacy
security.heading: Your data stays yours.
security.desc: iClaw runs entirely on your local network. Your conversations, files, and AI models never leave your device.

items.title: Local Processing
items.desc: All AI computation happens on-device. No cloud, no latency, no data leaks.

items.title: Encrypted Storage
items.desc: All local data is encrypted at rest using industry-standard protocols.

items.title: Zero Telemetry
items.desc: No tracking, no analytics, no usage data collection. Absolute privacy.

ecosystem.label: Ecosystem
ecosystem.desc: iClaw is backed by a growing ecosystem of agents, skills, plugins, and a vibrant community.

items.title: AI Agents
items.desc: Autonomous agents that execute complex tasks on your behalf.

items.title: Workflows
items.desc: Visual workflow builder for multi-step AI automations.

items.title: Plugin System
items.desc: Extend iClaw with community-built plugins and integrations.

items.title: API Access
items.desc: Full API for developers to build on top of iClaw.

items.title: Skills Library
items.desc: Pre-built AI skills for common tasks, ready to deploy instantly.

items.title: Community
items.desc: Join a global community of iClaw users sharing agents and skills.

iclaw.desc: One-time purchase. No subscriptions. No hidden fees.

iclawPage.desc: A plug-and-play personal AI computer. Powerful performance, silent operation, built for your desk.

features.title: Plug & Play
features.desc: No setup, no configuration. Power on and start using AI models immediately.

features.title: 100% Private
features.desc: All data stays on your device. No cloud uploads, no tracking, no data leaks.

features.title: Always On
features.desc: A dedicated AI companion that's always ready, learning and growing with you over time.

features.title: Rich Ecosystem
features.desc: AI agents, workflows, plugins, and a vibrant community — all at your fingertips.

uclawPage.subtitle: USB AI Assistant
uclawPage.desc: Pocket-sized AI that turns any computer into your personal AI workstation. Just plug in and go.

features.title: Ultra Portable
features.desc: Fits in your pocket or on a keychain. Take your AI assistant everywhere you go.

features.title: Instant AI
features.desc: Plug into any USB port and get instant access to AI models. No installation needed.

features.title: Universal Compatibility
features.desc: Works with any computer — Windows, Mac, or Linux. Your AI, on any machine.

features.title: Private & Secure
features.desc: Your data stays on the device. No cloud, no tracking, complete privacy.

useCases.title: Business Travel
useCases.desc: Plug into hotel or office computers for instant AI assistance without installing anything.

useCases.title: Student Life
useCases.desc: Use AI on campus computers, library workstations, or any shared machine.

useCases.title: Quick Tasks
useCases.desc: Need AI for a quick writing task or code review? Plug in, get it done, unplug.
